source.reconciliation: Article Portfolio Index rows matched by repository name against the V2 public repository snapshot.

repos.name: the-1d-atom
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive 1D Schrödinger equation solver (TISE + TDSE) with a Streamlit app; finite-difference eigensolver, split-operator FFT wave packets, real-time tunnelling, probability clouds, orthogonality heatmaps, and uncertainty principle verification

repos.name: the-alkane-assembler
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Graph-theoretic enumeration and visualization of alkane structural isomers (C₁-C₃₀), featuring OEIS A000602 validation, interactive combinatorial explosion plots, Lewis structure generation, and standard-state property estimation

repos.name: the-audible-integrator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Sonification of Energy Drift in Numerical Integration - A biophysics portfolio project

repos.name: the-blind-climber
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive comparison of Monte Carlo vs Molecular Dynamics on rugged energy landscapes; animated simulations with frame-by-frame playback, MD vs MC walker race, custom landscape drawing, and temperature studies for 9 temperatures; demonstrates how stochastic sampling escapes kinetic traps while deterministic dynamics get stuck

repos.name: the-cip-solver
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive CIP (Cahn-Ingold-Prelog) priority assignment solver with 3D molecular visualization, a "Priority Race" algorithm trace, R/S stereochemical determination, and a Challenge Mode quiz — built with Streamlit, Plotly, and NumPy; features 11 built-in chiral molecules across 3 difficulty levels

repos.name: the-digital-skin
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive molecular surface reconstruction using the Marching Cubes algorithm; generates Van der Waals, Solvent Accessible, and Solvent Excluded surfaces with animated probe-radius sweeps, curvature mapping, mesh quality analysis, and scalar field visualization

repos.name: the-fingerprint-of-liquids
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Radial Distribution Function (RDF) simulation for Lennard-Jones fluids. Features frame-by-frame animation, Radar View visualization of solvation shells, phase classification, and equilibration time estimation

repos.name: the-functional-group-hunter
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Streamlit web app for molecular functional group detection using VF2 subgraph isomorphism; features 41 functional groups, PubChem integration, MRI-style visualization, quiz mode, drug library analysis, and educational resources

repos.name: the-interactive-newman
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Streamlit app for real-time conformational energy landscape exploration — 20 molecules, 3 synchronized views (3D model, Newman projection, energy plot), Fourier torsional potentials, Energy Rollercoaster dynamics, and gauche-effect support

repos.name: the-iupac-parser
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive IUPAC nomenclature parser that converts systematic chemical names to molecular graphs; features regex-based tokenization, 8-step validation with correction suggestions, and an animated "Construction Site" visualization showing step-by-step molecule building

repos.name: the-mirror-test
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Chirality detector implementing the Kabsch algorithm (SVD-based optimal superposition) to test molecular superimposability; calculates RMSD between molecules and their mirror images.

repos.name: the-pac-man-thermodynamics
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive 2D Lennard-Jones fluid simulation demonstrating Periodic Boundary Conditions with ghost cell visualization; particles wrap around boundaries like Pac-Man

repos.name: the-phase-transition-canvas
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive 2D Lennard-Jones Molecular Dynamics Simulation with Temperature Painting

repos.name: the-pi-system-solver
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Hückel Molecular Orbital Theory solver for conjugated π-systems; computes eigenspectra, HOMO-LUMO gaps, delocalization energies, charge densities, & π-bond orders for 14 molecules; interactive Streamlit app w/ 3D molecular visualization, "Electronic Escalator," aromaticity classifier, UV-Vis spectral predictions, and ed. dropdowns

repos.name: the-protein-ebm-dsm-egnn-ald
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Energy-based diff model for protein struct gen via Denoising Score Matching; Equivar GNN computes scalar energy E_θ over all-atom coords [B, Nr, 37, 3] & derives conservative score field via 2nd-order autodiff; Predictor-Corrector sampling w/ Annealed Langevin Dynamics (SNR=0.2); target: Trp-cage (1L2Y). Scientific content provisional.

repos.name: the-quadtree-composer
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Barnes-Hut N-body simulation with real-time Quadtree visualization. Features adaptive spatial partitioning, adjustable θ parameter for accuracy/speed tradeoff, multiple initial distributions (galaxy, clustered, orbiting), and animated playback

repos.name: the-spink7-klk5-md-pipeline
repos.description: S26 AIRP: E2E MD pipeline for computing binding free energy of the SPINK7-KLK5 protease-antiprotease complex implicated in Eosinophilic Esophagitis; built on OpenMM w/ AMBER ff14SB/TIP3P, featuring steered MD (Jarzynski equality) & umbrella sampling (WHAM) for cross-validated ΔG ests.; 259 tests, full CPU valid. Scientific content provisional.

repos.name: the-spink7-klk5-md-pipeline-v2
repos.description: S26 AIRP: SPINK7-KLK5 MD pipeline V2 – an E2E OpenMM workflow for binding free energy computation via SMD/Jarzynski & Umbrella Sampling/WHAM; fixes 40 systematically identified V1 limitations spanning physical correctness, algo rigor, & sw arch; 3-tier force field hierarchy (AMBER/AMOEBA/ANI-2x); 367 tests. Scientific content provisional.

repos.name: the-spink7-klk5-md-pipeline-v3
repos.description: S26 AIRP: SPINK7-KLK5 MD pipeline V3 – an E2E MD pipeline for SPINK7-KLK5 binding free energy computation w/ OpenMM, AMBER ff14SB, & TIP3P; SMD/Jarzynski, Umbrella Sampling/WHAM/MBAR, metadynamics, & alchemical FEP; V3 benchmarks 33 experiments against 28 lit sources (7 PASS, 2 MARGINAL, 24 GPU-pending). Scientific content provisional.

repos.name: the-stochastic-heater
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Andersen Thermostat simulator with live Maxwell-Boltzmann visualization; demonstrates NVE→NVT ensemble transitions in molecular dynamics with frame-based animation, equilibration estimation, and thermostat comparison (Andersen/Berendsen/Nosé-Hoover)

repos.name: the-survival-of-the-fittest
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Genetic Algorithm vs Monte Carlo protein folding on the 2-D Hydrophobic-Polar (HP) lattice; six-page Streamlit app with interactive GA/MC comparison, phylogeny-of-folding lineage tracing, publication-quality Matplotlib panels, and a full test suite

repos.name: the-affinity-decoder
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Physics-based molecular docking scoring function decomposing protein-ligand binding affinity into five energy components (vdW, electrostatics, H-bond, desolvation, torsion); features per-atom contribution mapping, weight fitting against PDBbind data, sensitivity analysis, and 3D pose visualization; python/NumPy/Streamlit

repos.name: the-alphabet-of-life
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Skip-Gram Word2Vec embeddings for the 20 standard amino acids, built from scratch in NumPy; discovers biochemical groupings purely from protein sequence context; 8-page Streamlit dashboard with chemical maps, vector analogies, property radar, custom training, and BLOSUM62 spectral baseline

repos.name: the-allosteric-switch
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Streamlit app modeling cooperative oxygen binding in hemoglobin via three mathematical frameworks — the Hill equation, the MWC concerted model, and the KNF sequential model; features an animated "Breathing Tetramer" T↔R transition, CO poisoning simulation, Bohr effect visualization, and quantitative model comparison

repos.name: the-antibiotic-generator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Wasserstein GAN (WGAN-GP) for de novo antimicrobial peptide design with dual NumPy/PyTorch engines, biophysical evaluation (charge, hydrophobic moment, Boman index), interactive 3D molecular visualization, helical wheel analysis, and an 11-page Streamlit dashboard with scaling law analysis. Scientific content provisional.

repos.name: the-attention-lens
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Mini-BERT Transformer built from scratch, trained on protein sequences via masked language modeling; attention heads spontaneously learn 3D contact maps and secondary structure; dual NumPy/PyTorch engines, 10-page Streamlit dashboard, scaling from 103K to 4.75M parameters

repos.name: the-backbone-validator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Automated Ramachandran plot generation and protein backbone validation from the RCSB Protein Data Bank; interactive 6-page Streamlit app with NGL.js 3-D structure viewers, Plotly visualizations, steric-clash analysis, glycine exception explorer, and multi-structure comparison

repos.name: the-cells-budget
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Multi-organism Flux Balance Analysis (FBA) pipeline for E. coli, S. cerevisiae, & C. glutamicum core metab; predicts optim growth rates, essential genes, & aerobic–anaerobic metab rerouting — all from stoichiometry & lin programming (SciPy HiGHS); 8-page interactive Streamlit dashboard w/ organism-specific 3-D cell visualizations

repos.name: the-chemical-gps
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Streamlit dashboard for metabolic pathway discovery using BFS and A* search on a curated KEGG-derived reaction network; features 16 Plotly 3D visualizations, carbon-atom tracking, enzyme knockout essentiality analysis, and animated pathway walkthroughs

repos.name: the-dance-of-atoms
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Essential Dynamics extraction via PCA of molecular trajectories — Kabsch alignment, covariance eigendecomposition, free-energy landscapes, and PC interpolation "breathing movies" with Play/Pause animation, deployed as a 6-page Streamlit app with auto-fit 3-D visualization

repos.name: the-deep-dreamer
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Protein sequence design via activation maximization with Gumbel-Softmax relaxation; a 1-D CNN discovers α-helix, β-sheet, and stability motifs through gradient ascent on amino acid sequences; features interactive 3Dmol.js ribbon diagrams, NeRF backbone building, and a 9-page Streamlit dashboard. Pure NumPy

repos.name: the-digital-mutator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: In silico deep mutational scanning simulator powered by a structure-conditioned MPNN; predicts fitness effects of all single amino acid substitutions from backbone geometry & validates against GB1/GFP benchmarks; 10-page interactive Streamlit dashboard w/ 3D visualization, epistasis analysis, & pretrained model comparison

repos.name: the-evolution-of-affinity
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Genetic algorithm for molecular docking: evolves ligand poses w/ tournament selection, BLX-α crossover, & adaptive mutation against multi-component AutoDock4-calibrated scoring fn; Rodrigues rotation torsion transforms, oracle landscape validation, & interactive Streamlit dashboard; validated on 6 benchmark protein-ligand systems

repos.name: the-evolutionary-wormhole
repos.description: S26 AIRP: VAE-based protein sequence interpolation through latent space — dual NumPy/PyTorch engines, 6 model presets, fitness trajectories, scaling laws, and an 11-page Streamlit dashboard with a real-time "Protein Slider" for morphing between proteins

repos.name: the-field-generator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: 1-D Poisson-Boltzmann electrostatics solver with interactive Streamlit app; computes potential, electric field, ion profiles, and Debye screening for charged surfaces in ionic solutions; features "The Salt Slider" for real-time visualization of concentration-dependent screening

repos.name: the-force-field-engine
repos.description: S26 AIRP: From-scratch molecular mechanics force field engine computing U(r) with five energy terms (bonds, angles, dihedrals, LJ 12-6, Coulomb) and AMBER ff99 parameters; includes per-bond stress visualization, frustrated-region detection, bond-stretching experiments, and an 8-page Streamlit dashboard

repos.name: the-golden-sphere
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Shrake-Rupley Solvent Accessible Surface Area (SASA) engine w/ Fibonacci lattice sampling & differentiable sigmoid extension; features 6-page interactive Streamlit dashboard w/ 3-D dot cloud visualization, animated probe-radius sweep, soft vs hard SASA comparison, buried surface area calculator, & comprehensive theory derivations

repos.name: the-grand-sum
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Binding polynom engine & interactive Streamlit dashboard for macromol ligand binding; enumerates 2^N microstates, constructs partition function Q w/ SymPy, & derives frac satur, Hill coefs, cooperativity sweeps, pH linkage (Bohr Effect), & heat capacity — all from a single grand sum; 6 preset models from indep sites to hemoglobin

repos.name: the-graph-weaver
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Protein-to-graph conversion pipeline for Graph Neural Networks; converts PDB atomic coords -> learnable graph reps w/ 24-D node feats, 9-D edge feats (incl orientation quaternions), k-NN graph construction via KD-Tree, contact classif, & k-sweep analysis; 6-pg interactive Streamlit dashboard w/ PDB upload, 3-D viz, & 122 tests

repos.name: the-heat-spike
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Complete Isothermal Titration Calorimetry (ITC) simulator in Python — quadratic binding eq., 20-injection thermograms, nonlinear curve fitting, stoichiometry discovery, & entropy–enthalpy compensation; features a 6-page interactive Streamlit dashboard w/ Plotly animations, 3D parameter-space landscapes, & comprehensive ITC theory

repos.name: the-iso-surface-explorer
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive 3-D electrostatic field visualizer — computes Coulomb potentials on voxel grids, extracts equipotential iso-surfaces via marching cubes, and integrates electric field-line streamlines using RK45; features a 6-page Streamlit app, 11 preset charge configurations, and a CLI

repos.name: the-jiggling-gel
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Elastic Network Models for protein dynamics — GNM & ANM normal mode analysis with B-factor prediction, mode animation, and multi-protein benchmarking; interactive Streamlit dashboard + CLI

repos.name: the-lattice-folder
repos.description: S26 AIRP: 2-D Hydrophobic-Polar (HP) lattice model protein folding simulator with exact Depth-First Search (DFS) solver, branch-and-bound pruning, self-avoiding walk (SAW) enumeration for Levinthal's Paradox, energy landscape analysis, and an interactive Streamlit app with a "Beat the Computer" folding challenge

repos.name: the-lock-and-key
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Physics-based rigid-body molecular docking engine with an AutoDock4-calibrated five-term scoring function, soft-core Lennard-Jones potentials, binding-pocket carving, Monte Carlo simulated annealing with sigmoidal cooling, and interactive Streamlit visualization; validates pose prediction across 6 protein-ligand benchmark systems

repos.name: the-logic-of-life
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Boolean network sim for gene reg circuits — models Lac operon, toggle switch, repressilator, & cell cycle as disc dyn systems; performs exhaustive attractor analysis, basin-of-attraction partitioning, state-transition graph construction, & bit-flip mutation sim w/ phenotype-switch detection; 8-page interactive Streamlit dashboard

repos.name: the-melting-pot
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive thermodynamic stability profiler for proteins — implements the ΔCp-dependent Gibbs-Helmholtz equation to visualize the stability parabola, cold & heat denaturation, DSC/CD melting simulations, Van 't Hoff analysis, and mutation engineering via a 6-page Streamlit app with 3-D free-energy landscapes

repos.name: the-mini-fold
repos.description: S26 AIRP: A pedagogical implementation of AlphaFold2's Invariant Point Attention (IPA) for peptide structure prediction; pure NumPy inference engine with 6 pretrained models (PyTorch GPU + NumPy SPSA), interactive 11-page Streamlit dashboard, and full test suite; watch proteins fold from random coordinates through iterative recycling

repos.name: the-molecular-origami
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Distance geometry engine reconstructing 3D molecular coordinates from pairwise distance matrices via classical Multi-Dimensional Scaling (Torgerson, 1952), Kabsch alignment, L-BFGS-B stress refinement, & triangle inequality bounds smoothing; interactive Streamlit NMR sim w/ noise injection, 8 preset molecules, & 154 passing tests

repos.name: the-motif-sculptor
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Constrained inverse folding framework for transplanting catalytic motifs onto novel protein scaffolds; uses structure-conditioned message-passing neural networks (MPNNs) w/ locked-residue decoding, 9 pretrained models (NumPy/PyTorch/improved), & interactive Streamlit dashboard for 6 catalytic motifs × 8 scaffold architectures

repos.name: the-noise-of-life
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Py sim platform comparing deterministic ODE integration with Gillespie Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA) for gene expression; features 6-page Streamlit app w/ interactive Cell Volume Slider, ensemble sims, & noise analysis — demonstrating how molecular noise emerges at low copy numbers and vanishes in the thermodynamic limit

repos.name: the-oil-and-water-simulator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Implicit solvation model using the Shrake-Rupley algorithm for Solvent-Accessible Surface Area (SASA) calculation and Eisenberg-McLachlan atomic solvation parameters for solvation free energy estimation; 6-page Streamlit app with 3-D "Paintbrush of Fear" hydrophobicity surfaces, isomer comparison, multi-molecule explorer, and CLI

repos.name: the-phase-retriever
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Iterative phase-retrieval simulator for coherent diffraction imaging; recovers lost Fourier phases from intensity-only 2-D diffraction patterns using Error Reduction (ER), Hybrid Input-Output (HIO), and RAAR algorithms; 10 test phantoms, beam-stop robustness analysis, convergence viz, & a 6-page interactive Streamlit dashboard

repos.name: the-pocket-finder
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Geometric ligand binding pocket detection on molecular surfaces using discrete differential geometry — cotangent Laplacian curvature, BFS concave-region segmentation, void volume estimation & druggability scoring

repos.name: the-reciprocal-eye
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive 2-D diffraction simulator; Fourier-transform relationship between real-space atomic structures and reciprocal-space diffraction patterns for 11 presets — from crystal lattices to DNA helices (Photo 51); features real-time param tuning, freeform drawing canvas, pub-quality figure export, & comprehensive theory reference

repos.name: the-relaxation-therapy
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Steepest descent energy minimization for molecular mechanics — implements fixed-step, adaptive, and Armijo line-search variants with AMBER ff99 analytical gradients, convergence analysis, step-size sensitivity experiments, and an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualizing the "un-crumpling" of perturbed molecular structures

repos.name: the-rotation-proof-network
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Pure-NumPy E(n) Equivariant Graph Neural Net. (EGNN) for rot invariant molec property pred; 11-page Streamlit dashboard w/ 3D molecule rotation, SE(3) stress tests, energy decomp, & 6 pretrained model presets (PyTorch GPU + NumPy); demonstrates exact rot invariance (σ < 10⁻¹⁵) vs std. GNN failure (σ ~ 0.5) for 8 preset molecules

repos.name: the-rubber-protein
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive Freely Jointed Chain (FJC) polymer elasticity simulator — Langevin force–extension, Monte Carlo random-walk ensembles, temperature paradox demonstration, and FJC/Hookean/WLC model comparison; six-page Streamlit dashboard with Plotly animations, 3-D visualizations, and 108 pytest tests

repos.name: the-secondary-translator
repos.description: S26 AIRP: From-scratch Bidirectional LSTM in NumPy for protein secondary structure prediction (Q3: Helix/Sheet/Coil); interactive 3D ribbon diagrams via NeRF backbone gen + 3Dmol.js, PDB file upload for exper struct comparison, cell state viz, & 7-page Streamlit dashboard; >70% Q3 acc on synth Chou-Fasman propensity-weighted training data

repos.name: the-sequence-whisperer
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Pure NumPy ProteinMPNN-lite inverse folding engine — predicts amino acid sequences from protein backbone structures using SE(3)-invariant message-passing neural networks; features 6 pretrained models (PyTorch GPU + NumPy CPU), 8 preset protein topologies, and an 11-page interactive Streamlit dashboard

repos.name: the-shape-index
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Koenderink's Shape Index for differential geometric analysis of molecular surfaces; maps principal curvatures to rotation-invariant descriptor S ∈ [−1, +1], w/ patch segmentation, saddle-point detection, & protein–ligand lock-and-key complementarity analysis; interactive 6-page Streamlit dashboard w/ 3-D Plotly visualizations

repos.name: the-structural-qr-code
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Contact map generation & automated secondary structure identification from protein PDB coordinates — interactive 6-page Streamlit app with α-helix/β-sheet pattern detection, folding trajectory animation, 3-D distance surfaces, and multi-structure comparison

repos.name: the-symmetry-engine
repos.description: S26 AIRP: 3-D Space Group Generator — interactive Streamlit app that builds crystal lattices from a single object using Seitz symmetry operations; implements 12 space groups (P1 through I432), 8 test objects, clash detection, and a kaleidoscope comparison mode

repos.name: the-virtual-fermenter
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Py sim platform for Michaelis-Menten enzyme kinetics; solves full 4-species ODE system with custom RK4 integrator, revealing pre-steady-state transients invisible to steady-state approx; features animated rxn progress curve, interactive Lineweaver-Burk analysis, compet/non-compet/uncompetitive inhib modules, & nonlin reg fitting

repos.name: the-voxelizer
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Gaussian density voxelization of molecular structures into multi-channel 3D grids for deep learning; features an MRI-style slice viewer, resolution/sigma analysis, isosurface rendering, and CNN-ready export (.npy/.h5)

repos.name: the-time-reversibility-paradox
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive visualization of Loschmidt's paradox - how time-reversible Newtonian mechanics becomes irreversible due to microscopic chaos and floating-point sensitivity

repos.name: the-unbreakable-bond
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive SHAKE Algorithm for Molecular Dynamics - compares rigid vs elastic bond models with real-time simulations, slow-motion iteration playback, and stability analysis

repos.name: the-vibrating-string
repos.description: S26 AIRP: Interactive IR spectrum simulator with normal-mode analysis via Hessian diagonalization; ball-and-spring molecular models for 10 molecules — 3D animated vibrations, Lorentzian-broadened IR spectra, audible sonification of vibrational modes, mystery molecule game, and Hessian inspector
